title: Multi-stage Todo goal workflow
purpose: First implement title behavior, then add priority while preserving the title behavior as a regression constraint.

root_objective.title: Build a staged Todo workflow
root_objective.description: Create a minimal Todo workflow that can first track item titles and later add priority without breaking the title behavior.
constraints: Title behavior must remain stable when priority is introduced.
acceptance: A todo item can be created with a title.
Adding priority does not change the stored title.

objectives.title: Implement title-only Todo items
objectives.description: Represent a todo item with a title and create/list behavior.
constraints: No priority field is required in the first stage.
acceptance: Creating an item with title Buy milk preserves title Buy milk.

objectives.title: Add Todo priority
objectives.description: Add a priority field after title behavior has been accepted.
constraints: Priority must not overwrite or reinterpret title.
acceptance: An item can carry title and priority together.

milestones.name: Title stage
scope: Create and list title-only todo items.

milestones.name: Priority stage
scope: Add priority to an accepted title item model.
acceptance: Priority exists and old title checks still pass.

steps.notes: Title-only stage is accepted before introducing priority.

steps.request: Add a priority field to todo items while keeping existing title behavior unchanged.

preserved_constraints: Title behavior must remain stable when priority is introduced.
unknowns: Priority ordering is intentionally out of scope.
regression_constraints: Existing title-only create/list checks must still pass.

acceptance: An item with title Buy milk and priority High preserves both fields.

records.prompt: Manual graph run prompt: stage the Todo workflow, accept title behavior, then admit priority only with a title regression constraint.

notes: Priority is a second-stage change, not part of the first title milestone.
Graph-level verification confirms accepted change keeps old title regression in active context.
